title: polystichum lobatum var. luctuosum
intro: Polystichum lobatum var. luctuosum, also known as the Black Brake Fern, is a plant species within the Osmundaceae family. It is a type of fern used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties. The Black Brake Fern is said to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried, ground into a powder, or made into an infusion to be used in traditional remedies, such as teas and tonics.
